name: Biofuturism
overview: What will the world we know look like in a few decades? The popular science documentary series talks about the technologies of the present, which will certainly change the future. A pill for all diseases, genetic engineering, nanorobots, 3D printing, virus treatment are just some of the revolutionary discoveries that are changing the present right now. Scientists and opinion leaders share their impressions of how they see the world of the future and what it will actually look like. Will people turn into walking gadgets with superpowers? The series will help you understand modern scientific trends and the most breakthrough areas.
